checks.description: Selected model must be one of the supported candidates.
Model metrics should be valid probabilities in [0, 1].
ML targeting should match or outperform random baseline on holdout revenue per targeted user.
Budget-constrained policy evaluation should include ML/Random/RFM for validation and test slices.
Budget-constrained policy comparison must target at least one user.
Sensitivity output should include windows 30, 60, and 90 days.
